# Cfind Platform

## About
Cfind is the premier marketplace for buying and selling businesses in Albania. We connect business owners with verified investors through trusted agents.

## Core Features
- **Verified Listings**: All businesses are vetted by professional agents.
- **Blind Listings**: Sensitive details (real name, exact location) are hidden until inquiry approval.
- **Agent-Driven**: Transactions are managed by experienced innovative real estate agents.
- **Dual Currency**: Prices displayed in EUR and LEK.

## Routes
- /listings: Browse all active business listings.
- /how-it-works: Guide for buyers and sellers.
- /list-your-business: Form for sellers to submit their business.
- /agents: Directory of verified agents.

## Data Structure
Listings contain:
- Public Title (EN/SQ)
- Public Description
- Financials (Revenue, Profit, Asking Price)
- Location (City, Area)
- Operational Details (Employees, Years in Operation)

## Contact
For inquiries, users must register and contact agents via WhatsApp, Phone, or Email.
